exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your end of life planning forward
items: Schedule appointments with an estate planning attorney to draft or update your will, healthcare directive, and power of attorney documents
Gather and organize all your current legal documents including birth certificate, social security card, passport, marriage certificate, and property deeds in one secure location
Research and obtain a copy of your state\
Create certified copies of your will and distribute them to your executor, attorney, and a secure backup location
Schedule a consultation with an attorney to establish a durable power of attorney for finances and understand your state\
Create a comprehensive list of all financial accounts, debts, and assets with account numbers and contact information
